refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery from faults.
refined_fr.rationale: Operational availability depends on both minimizing failure occurrences and ensuring quick recovery, so decomposing into fault management and recovery functions clarifies design focus.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure system uptime and downtime over the evaluation period; verify availability metric against target.
sub_frs: FR1: Minimize system failure occurrences to reduce downtime.
FR2: Enable rapid recovery and fault handling to restore operation quickly.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement robust fault detection and predictive maintenance algorithms.
DP2: Design automated fault recovery and failover mechanisms.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement robust fault detection and predictive maintenance algorithms; DP2: Design automated fault recovery and failover mechanisms.

potential_sources: Fault detection algorithms tightly coupled with recovery mechanisms due to shared fault data.
Predictive maintenance data may influence recovery prioritization.
coupling_check.notes: Coupling is expected and manageable with clear interface definitions between detection and recovery modules.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of reliable sensor data for fault detection.
Risk that recovery mechanisms may not cover all fault types, impacting availability.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider further decomposition if recovery mechanisms become too complex or tightly coupled.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level responsibility for availability, integrating fault detection and recovery functions.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Used for receiving sensor data and sending status updates relevant to availability.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands that may affect system availability.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts if availability issues impact safety.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication for remote monitoring and teleoperation affecting availability.

module_containment_scores.notes: Centralizes availability logic and integrates fault detection and recovery.
Contains physical components but limited direct control over availability logic.
Supports remote control but availability logic is not primarily contained here.
Focuses on safety alerts, not availability management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Availability management is best contained within the NGHE Solution module to centralize fault detection and recovery logic, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module if availability logic grows too large.
Risk of interface overload with multiple external interfaces.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity and consider splitting availability functions into submodules if diffusion or complexity increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DPs logically satisfy the refined FRs with clear mapping to fault detection and recovery functions.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk exists if availability logic grows within NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as best ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Availability can be verified at the NGHE Solution level through telemetry and operational data.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of availability responsibility to NGHE Solution module.

recommended_revisions: Track complexity growth in NGHE Solution module to avoid diffusion.
Ensure interfaces are well-defined and limited to necessary data flows.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition level is complete with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment meeting criteria and passing gate reviews.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Minimize system failure occurrences to reduce downtime.
FR2: Enable rapid recovery and fault handling to restore operation quickly.

revise.why: No immediate revisions needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Recovery mechanisms cover critical fault types.
open_risks: Complexity growth in NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Operational availability data from system tests.
Verification of fault detection and recovery effectiveness.
